metadata.description: Clickatell + Stratafy cowork plugins — Claude grounded in Clickatell's strategy and methodology

plugins.name: stratafy-core
plugins.description: Stratafy platform connector — connection state, sync transparency, telemetry visibility. Universal companion to any customer-branded marketplace plugin. Reports cache freshness from project-scoped local files.

plugins.name: clickatell
plugins.description: Clickatell-branded employee surface — setup (welcome + onboard-me), weekly rhythm (lets-go + call-it-a-week), and always-available reference (help + foundation). Local cache scoped to the project folder.
